summary: Frontend-only testing of skins + XP progression for Mr. Maybe Flight. All requested UI elements render correctly on mobile viewport (390x844). Home screen shows LVL badge, XP card with `xpInto / xpNeeded XP` text, and 3-button row (Skins/Settings/Calib.). /skins screen renders header (back, title, LVL chip), 4 free skin cards, 3 premium skin cards, all with correct chips (EQUIPPED, lock criteria, PREMIUM badge + 'Premium · Coming Soon'). Plane on home uses equippedSkin from progress. Equip flow verified end-to-end: seeded localStorage with skyblue owned, tapped Skyliner card, EQUIPPED chip moved from Origami to Skyliner, persisted to localStorage, and home plane re-rendered with the blue skin. Settings screen still works. /_layout has skins route. Zero pageerrors and zero null reference errors across all flows. Note from main agent about /skins showing only background was NOT reproduced — page renders correctly even on first load (loadProgress resolves to DEFAULT_PROGRESS via the catch).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'useNativeDriver is not supported because the native animated module is missing. Falling back to JS-based animation'. This is web-only and harmless but noisy. Not blocking.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Minor RN web deprecation, not blocking.

action_items: No fixes required — all requested features working. Optionally suppress/replace Animated useNativeDriver:true on web and migrate pointerEvents prop to style.pointerEvents to silence console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: game.tsx is large; consider splitting reward block + game-over overlay into a separate component for maintainability (file size hygiene).

skins.tsx early-return-when-null UI path renders an empty SafeAreaView; works because loadProgress.catch returns DEFAULT_PROGRESS, but consider rendering the grid with DEFAULT_PROGRESS immediately (like index.tsx does) to avoid any flash of empty background on slow devices.
seed_data_creation: Used page.evaluate to set localStorage key '@mmf_progress_v1' with xp=250, ownedSkins=['origami','skyblue'] to validate equip flow. Cleared by browser session ending.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tests run via Playwright at https://flying-game-demo-1.preview.emergentagent.com on 390x844 viewport. AsyncStorage on web maps to localStorage with key '@mmf_progress_v1'. To simulate progress for skin/equip tests, seed localStorage before reload. game-over reward-block (testID='reward-block') cannot be exercised on web since DeviceMotion sensors don't fire — verified only at JSX/import level. Run `grep -n 'reward-block\|runResult' /app/frontend/app/game.tsx` to confirm structure.
rca_of_issue: Main agent suspected /skins might show only background due to loadProgress null. Not reproduced — tested fresh load (no localStorage) and seeded load: in both cases the skin grid renders correctly, because DEFAULT_PROGRESS path in catch/empty-raw branch is hit and setProgress is called. Suggestion in code review remains: seed state with DEFAULT_PROGRESS in useState initializer instead of `null` early-return for extra safety.
